embedded_contract.objective: Provide a minimal content-bound merge readiness fixture.
embedded_contract.selected_direction: Require a matching diff hash and a re-verifiable Linon packet before merge.
embedded_contract.implementation_summary: Fixture only: demonstrate a real readiness record bound to its diff.
acceptance_criteria: A readiness record with a matching diff hash, clear Linon review, and valid packet passes.
non_goals: No real GitHub network calls in fixture verification.
embedded_contract.fallback_plan: Fail closed if hashes or review evidence drift.
embedded_contract.handoff_to_implementer: Fixture contract for content-bound merge readiness only.
